'''Old Town''' was a neighborhood of [[Bagsho]] on [[Nim Drovis]]. It was crisscrossed by canals and was near the [[Thousand Stinking Ditches]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
